title: OST Discs
description: Play any song Minecraft OST (old or new) using Music Discs.
body:
Ever wanted to listen to a specific song of the Minecraft OST? Well now you can with OST Discs.

It's simple: Get the discs and put it in a jukebox!
You can obtain the discs like any other vanilla disc, get a skeleton to shoot a creeper and then a disc will drop. 

Features: Adds Every Single Minecraft OST into a music disc.

Credits: All textures are made by PhiFlo2021
